simulations.name: Dist-fromfile
simulations.description: Dist-fromfile: 1 step FROMFILE distribution read-in sanity check without BINNING element.

simulations.name: Dist-gauss
simulations.description: Dist-gauss: 1 step Gaussian distribution sanity without BINNING element.

simulations.name: Dist-gauss-bins
simulations.description: Dist-gauss-bins: 1 step Gaussian distribution sanity check with BINNING element.

simulations.name: Dist-multivariate
simulations.description: Dist-multivariate: 1 step Multivariate Gaussian distribution sanity check.

simulations.name: Drift-long-open
simulations.description: Minimal larger scale drift with one bin, open field solver, low resolution and four empty drift elements. Adapted from previous awa-... tests. Exists to test a big drift with space charge.

simulations.name: Drift-open
simulations.description: Drift with open space charge solver, 20 steps. Simulates pure space charge expansion, very small initial P0.

simulations.name: Drift-open-bins
simulations.description: Drift with bins in accelerating cavity: create significant energy spread that leads to multiple bins. When particles are close to c, bin number decreases.

simulations.name: Drift-open-muon-decay
simulations.description: Drift with open space charge solver, MUON beam, global DECAY enabled.

simulations.name: Drift-periodic
simulations.description: Drift with periodic FFT space charge solver, 20 steps. Simulates pure space charge expansion, very small initial P0.

simulations.name: Qpole-short
simulations.description: FODO channel no space charge 7 MeV e
